stemHtml: How will an SSR interrogation be directed toward a specific aircraft?

options.a: Controller-Pilot Data-Link Communications (CPDLC) will reply with a unique aircraft identifier.
options.b: The SSR interrogation is directed to the aircraft’s position.
options.c: By limiting the beam width of the SSR transmission.
options.d: With a unique 24-bit address in the interrogation.
